name: Payday Advance
description_short: Advance America offers payday loans, title loans, and online personal loans with same-day funding at physical locations and online in California.
description_long: Advance America is an established short-term lending company operating physical storefronts and online lending services across California. The company specializes in quick-access emergency funding through payday loans, title loans, and online personal loans designed for borrowers who need fast cash. According to their website, they serve communities throughout California with multiple store locations, including the Reseda area and surrounding regions in Los Angeles County. The company claims an A+ Better Business Bureau rating, over 100,000 5-star reviews on Google, and nearly 60,000 5-star reviews on Trustpilot. Advance America positions itself as offering "personal loans" that are "finally personal" with emphasis on fast approval decisions and same-day funding when approved. Their service model includes both in-store applications at physical locations and online application options for borrower convenience. The company also offers Western Union services at certain locations. Store hours are consistent across locations: Monday-Friday 10:00 AM - 6:00 PM, Saturday 9:00 AM - 1:00 PM, and closed Sundays. What distinguishes Advance America is their hybrid model combining physical retail locations with online lending, allowing borrowers to choose between in-person service and remote application. They maintain an extensive network of storefronts within a reasonable radius of Reseda, with locations in Van Nuys, San Fernando, Los Angeles, Inglewood, Alhambra, Hawthorne, South Gate, Montebello, Carson, and Bellflower. The company emphasizes speed of approval and funding as a core value proposition, promising instant approval decisions and potential same-day cash access. As a provider of payday and title loans, Advance America serves a market segment of consumers seeking immediate cash access without traditional credit requirements. However, payday and title loans carry inherent risks including high fees, interest rates, and debt cycle potential that borrowers should carefully consider before proceeding.
pros: Same-day or next-day funding when approved, addressing urgent cash needs
Multiple application methods: in-store at 10+ nearby locations or online from home
Extensive local presence with stores in Van Nuys (5 mi), San Fernando (7.9 mi), and throughout Greater Los Angeles area
A+ Better Business Bureau rating and significant review volume (100K+ Google reviews, 60K+ Trustpilot reviews)
Fast approval decisions with instant decision notification per website claims
No mention of minimum credit score requirements, potentially accessible to those with poor credit
Additional service: Western Union money transfer available at select locations
cons: Payday and title loans typically carry APRs exceeding 400%, creating high-cost debt with significant repayment burden
Debt cycle risk: short repayment terms (typically 2 weeks) and rollover structures encourage repeat borrowing
Title loans require vehicle collateral, risking loss of transportation if unable to repay
Website does not disclose specific fees, rates, or loan terms, preventing informed comparison before application
Limited to physical California locations or online; not available nationwide
best_for: Consumers facing genuine emergencies (medical bills, evictions, urgent repairs) who need same-day cash and have no other options
Borrowers with poor credit scores unable to qualify for traditional personal loans or credit cards
Short-term bridge borrowers who can repay within 2 weeks and understand the full cost structure
diagnosis: Advance America is best for consumers facing genuine financial emergencies who need immediate cash and lack access to traditional credit. Critical caveat: payday and title loans carry extreme costs (typically 400%+ APR) and high default/rollover rates; this should only be considered as a last resort after exhausting credit unions, employer advances, or nonprofit emergency assistance programs.
services: Payday loans (short-term loans with same-day funding capability)
Online personal loans (remote application and funding)
In-store personal loan applications at physical locations
Western Union money transfer services (at select locations)
Multi-location retail storefronts for in-person service
